labels.prayasvanDesc: An integrated green space with 13 distinct zones — 10,000 trees of 70 species on 25 acres.

prayasvan.title: Prayasvan
prayasvan.subtitle: An integrated green space with 13 distinct zones. Click on any zone below for more information.
prayasvan.about1: As per the National Forest Policy Act 1988, the government has adopted a policy of tree plantation and conservation with the participation of NGOs to achieve the target of forest cover. Accordingly, a tripartite agreement was signed between the Forest Department (M.R.) Prayas Yavatmal and Dilas Sanstha, Ghatanji and the creation of 'Prayasavan' was started with an eye on planting 10 thousand trees on 25 acres of forest land near Yavatmal city. Along with the objectives of creating a sustainable and healthy environment near Yavatmal city, maintaining ecological balance, this is a pilot project in collaboration with social institutions, organizations, and people from the civil society.
prayasvan.about2: A total of 10 thousand trees of 70 different species are being planted in this area and the responsibility of conservation will be carried out by Prayas Yavatmal with the cooperation of all. Various birds will live on various trees of local varieties in this area. Through this, this project will be a pilot project in terms of protecting the habitats of birds, protecting biodiversity, and strengthening the food chain.
prayasvan.visionText: This passion of like-minded citizens to work together, selflessly, to preserve the natural resources of society and the next generation and to protect the environment is called "Prayas". We are dedicated to working for nature conservation and human upliftment.
prayasvan.zodiacDesc: Planting of 12 sacred trees of 12 zodiac signs according to the zodiac principle.

home.heroTitle: PRAYAS – A Collective & Selfless Team Effort
home.heroSubtitle: Empowering communities through selfless service and civic action
home.heroTagline: Building a stronger, united India — one initiative at a time
home.missionDesc: Building a better tomorrow through dedicated civic action and community engagement across India. We believe in the power of collective effort to create lasting social change.
home.valueUnityDesc: Bringing together people from all walks of life to work towards common goals for societal betterment.
home.valueInnovationDesc: Implementing creative solutions to address civic challenges and drive meaningful community transformation.
home.valueSustainableDesc: Creating long-term impact through sustainable initiatives that empower communities and preserve our heritage.
home.footerDesc: A civic NGO dedicated to empowering communities through selfless service and social initiatives across India.
home.footerConnectDesc: Join us in making a difference. Together, we can build a stronger, more united India.
home.footerAddress: Director House, Behind Sanjeevan Hospital & Research Institute, Mahadev Mandir Road, Ratanlal Plots, Yavatmal — 445001

about.title: PRAYAS – A Collective & Selfless Team Effort
about.subtitle: To do something selflessly for society.
about.joinDesc: So, friends, let's all come together and do this environmental protection work, awaken the new generation, which will make life easier for the next generation.
about.content1: And while doing this, a group of people who firmly believe that I am doing this work for my own good, not for anyone else is
about.content2: And that is why the name Prayas Yavatmal, although it seems related to Yavatmal, has a very wide scope. The Prayas inspired by this thought are working all over the world with this thought.
about.content3: the founder president of Prayas Sevankur Sanstha Amravati, who took up social work in his youth, is our source of inspiration, who showed us this path of happiness, gave us the strength to walk on it and is still standing firmly behind us.
about.content4: With his inspiration, we started the first planned, monthly and inspiring
about.content4b: program of dialogue with dream-mad people from April 2014 and it ran for 40 consecutive months. This program was also inspiring for us. That is why we jumped from dialogue to action, undertook various community-oriented projects and completed them. Even the failures in some work became a guide for us.
about.projectsDesc: All these works were made possible only with the cooperation of all the citizens of Yavatmal, government officials, our countless friends and fans. Yavatmal will never forget to express their gratitude because it is with the cooperation of all of them that Yavatmal has taken a great effort to continue the work of environmental protection.

donate.title: Make a Difference Today
donate.subtitle: Your contribution helps us continue our mission of selfless service and community empowerment across India.
donate.contactDesc: For donation inquiries, tax exemption certificates, or to learn more about how your contribution makes an impact, please reach out to us through our contact channels.
donate.thankYouDesc: Every contribution, big or small, helps us continue our mission of building a stronger, more united India through selfless service and civic action.
donate.communityDevDesc: Supporting local communities through education, healthcare, and infrastructure development initiatives.
donate.socialWelfareDesc: Providing essential services and support to underprivileged sections of society.
donate.envProtectionDesc: Leading initiatives for environmental conservation and sustainable development.
donate.youthEmpDesc: Inspiring and guiding the next generation towards civic responsibility and social action.
